name: race_chase
description: Fast-paced, intense chase music with driving percussion and urgent strings. Perfect for running races, competitions, and action sequences.
trigger_hints: Play during race sequences, chase scenes, or competitive sports moments. Start at 'Go!' command.

sources.title: Action Sport Rock Trailer
sources.author: SoundGalleryByDmitryTaras
sources.notes: High-energy rock with driving drums. Duration ~2:15. Perfect for race/action sequences.

mixing_notes.ducking: reduce by 3-4 dB during dialogue, keep prominent during action
